description: Physics-style elimination rules for material conditions (no DB, no suppliers).

rules.reasoning: Continuous processing above 175°C exceeds the validated thermal envelope for grade S3 binders.
observable_expectations: DSC: onset of binder softening or degradation before target cure plateau
FTIR: carbonyl growth consistent with oxidative or thermal breakdown

rules.reasoning: Ambient RH above 85% with declared hygroscopic filler drives uncontrolled moisture uptake during open mix.
observable_expectations: Karl Fischer or loss-on-drying spike vs dry baseline
Viscosity drift during idle open time exceeding QC band

rules.reasoning: Bulk pH below 3.5 implies aggressive acid catalysis incompatible with default stabiliser package.
observable_expectations: Titration curve inflection inconsistent with target buffer capacity
Salt formation or precipitation within first 30 minutes of hold

rules.reasoning: Bulk pH above 11.5 risks saponification or filler attack under stated silicate chemistry.
observable_expectations: Conductivity rise during idle indicating ion release
Particle size shift in laser diffraction vs pre-mix baseline

rules.reasoning: Target d90 below 5 µm is unlikely at peak shear under 500 s⁻¹ for this dispersion class (risk flag, not hard eliminate).
observable_expectations: Microscopy or laser diffraction tail above 10 µm after nominally complete dispersion step
